What We Offer

Two Core Services.
One Reliable Partner.

Purpose-built for wholesale carriers, MVNOs, and enterprises that need connectivity they can count on — at scale.

Wholesale Voice

A-Z Termination

Full A-Z voice termination with CLI and non-CLI routes, direct and premium options. LCR routing keeps costs optimised while real-time QoS monitoring keeps your traffic clean.

  • Direct carrier routes to 200+ countries
  • Flexible CLI, non-CLI, and premium routing
  • Real-time QoS dashboard and analytics
Explore Voice Solutions →

A2P SMS & Messaging

SMPP / API

From OTP authentication to large-scale marketing campaigns — our messaging platform delivers reliably, globally. SMPP and API integration make onboarding fast and painless.

  • OTP, alerts, notifications & marketing SMS
  • High delivery rates with real-time reporting
  • Scalable for millions of messages per day
Explore Messaging →
How We Connect You

From your platform to any destination.

We sit between your infrastructure and the global carrier network — routing voice and SMS traffic intelligently, reliably, and transparently.

Your traffic enters our network
Connect via SIP for voice or REST API / SMPP for messaging. Onboarding is fast — most partners are live within hours.
LCR engine selects the best route
Our routing engine evaluates quality, cost, and delivery performance in real time — picking the optimal path for every call or message.
Delivered via direct carrier connections
Traffic terminates through our direct interconnects with carriers across 200+ countries — fewer hops, better quality, faster delivery confirmation.
Why Velocitel Global

We built this to solve
real problems.

The telecom wholesale market has a transparency problem. Slow support, opaque pricing, and rigid infrastructure are the norm. We built Velocitel Global to be the opposite — agile, honest, and genuinely easy to work with.

Our Story

Fast Execution

Onboarding and route setup happen in hours, not weeks. We don't have legacy systems slowing us down.

Transparent Pricing

No hidden fees, no surprise rate changes. Our pricing is clear and our communication is open.

Built by Professionals

Our team has operated inside carriers and wholesale businesses. We speak your language and understand your pain points.

Modern Infrastructure

Cloud-native stack, no legacy limitations. Flexible and ready to scale with your traffic growth.

Start Today

Ready to connect globally?

Tell us about your traffic needs. We'll respond the same day with a tailored routing plan and pricing.

About Velocitel Global

A Modern Telecom Partner,
Built Differently.

Founded by telecom professionals who spent their careers inside carriers and wholesale operations — and grew tired of the same problems that seemed impossible to fix.

Our Foundation

We built what we
wished existed.

The telecom wholesale market is full of experienced professionals running into the same walls — slow support response, pricing opacity, and infrastructure that takes weeks to adapt to simple changes.

Velocitel Global was built from the ground up to address these frustrations. Based in Ras Al Khaimah, UAE — a hub for international connectivity — we serve carriers, enterprises, and messaging businesses worldwide with the kind of partnership we always wanted to receive.

  • Deep expertise in international voice and A2P SMS
  • Direct carrier relationships, not aggregator chains
  • Agile enough to move fast, experienced enough to do it right
01

Transparency

Clear pricing, honest communication, and no surprises. What you see is what you get.

02

Flexibility

Route configurations, pricing models, integration options — shaped to fit your operation.

03

Responsiveness

Real people, real answers, fast. No ticket queues and no holding music.

Our Commitment

What you can always expect from us.

Every decision we make is guided by the same question: would we want this if we were the customer? The answer shapes how we operate, every day.

Same-Day Response

Every inquiry, every support ticket, every escalation — answered the same business day. Not a chatbot. A real person who understands your traffic.

Clear, Open Pricing

Rate sheets that make sense. Changes communicated in advance. No hidden fees buried in contracts. We treat pricing as a conversation, not a negotiation tactic.

Fast, Flexible Setup

New routes, configuration changes, integration support — done in hours. Our infrastructure is modern by design, not patched together over decades.

The Team

Telecom professionals
at every level.

From network engineering to commercial operations, our team has worked inside carriers, interconnect hubs, and messaging platforms. We don't just sell connectivity — we understand it.

Route Options

Choose the route
that fits your traffic.

We don't offer one-size-fits-all. Match your route configuration to your quality needs and cost targets.

Option 01
Premium Routes
Highest quality, direct carrier paths. Ideal for sensitive or high-value traffic.
Option 02
Direct Routes
Carrier-direct connections. Strong quality with competitive pricing.
Option 03
CLI Routes
Caller ID delivered intact. Essential for business and enterprise origination.
Option 04
Non-CLI Routes
Cost-efficient routing for traffic where CLI is not required.
Core Technology

Least Cost
Routing (LCR)

Our LCR engine continuously evaluates routes by cost, quality score, and delivery performance. You get the best path for every destination — automatically.

  • Real-time route scoring and switching
  • Quality thresholds enforced automatically
  • Fallback routes prevent dropped traffic
  • Destination-level granularity
  • Full QoS reporting dashboard
Technical Specifications

What you can expect from us.

Parameter Specification
Coverage200+ countries & territories
ProtocolsSIP (TCP/UDP), H.323
Codec SupportG.711, G.729, G.722, iLBC, Opus
Route TypesPremium, Direct, CLI, Non-CLI
Network Uptime99.9% SLA
QoS MonitoringReal-time, 24/7
ASR Target≥ 60% (varies by destination)
ACD Target≥ 3 minutes (premium routes)
InterconnectIP peering & direct BGP available
Key Capabilities

Built for wholesale scale.

Real-Time QoS Monitoring

Track ASR, ACD, PDD, and NER across all routes and destinations — live. Issues surface before they become problems.

Transparent Rate Sheets

Clear, up-to-date rate sheets per destination. No surprises. Rate changes communicated with proper advance notice.

Direct Carrier Access

Many of our routes are sourced direct from carriers — not aggregators. That means better quality, fewer hops, and faster resolution when something goes wrong.

Fraud Management

Proactive IRSF and wangiri detection. Our traffic filters protect you from fraudulent patterns before they hit your bill.

Flexible Volumes

From trial traffic to high-volume wholesale partnerships — our infrastructure scales with you. No minimum commitments required to start.

Dedicated NOC

24/7 Network Operations Centre monitoring all routes. Any degradation is caught and acted on — day or night.

Need competitive voice rates?

Share your key destinations and volume expectations — we'll come back with a full rate sheet and routing recommendation.

Request Rates Now

Use Cases

Every messaging need,
covered.

🔐

OTP & Authentication

Secure, instant one-time password delivery for login flows, transactions, and account verification.

2FA Account verification Password reset Transaction auth
🔔

Alerts & Notifications

Real-time operational alerts for banking, logistics, healthcare, and system monitoring applications.

Banking alerts Delivery updates System alerts Appointment reminders
📣

Marketing & Promotions

High-reach bulk SMS campaigns with strong delivery rates. Ideal for retail, events, and customer engagement.

Bulk campaigns Promotions Event notifications Customer retention
Focus: OTP

Authentication
that can't fail.

When a user is waiting to log in or confirm a transaction, message delivery isn't optional — it's the product. Our OTP routing is tuned for speed and reliability above all else.

  • Sub-10 second delivery targets on priority routes
  • Automatic route failover if primary path degrades
  • Global reach across 190+ countries
  • Dedicated OTP sender IDs available
// Sample message flow
API Request → SMSC
{ to: "+971...", msg: "Your code: 847291" }
⬇ route selection (~50ms)
LCR Engine
Selecting optimal OTP route...
⬇ delivery (~3s)
✓ DELIVERED
DLR confirmed · 2.8s total
Focus: Alerts

Real-time updates,
zero lag.

Whether it's a bank notifying a customer of a transaction or a logistics platform tracking a delivery, time-sensitive alerts need infrastructure that keeps up.

  • High throughput for simultaneous bulk dispatch
  • Configurable retry logic for undelivered messages
  • Delivery reports via webhook or polling
  • Ideal for banks, logistics, healthcare & SaaS
🏦
Banking
Transaction & fraud alerts
📦
Logistics
Delivery status updates
🏥
Healthcare
Appointment reminders
⚙️
SaaS / Tech
System & security alerts
Focus: Marketing SMS

Reach millions.
Convert more.

SMS remains one of the highest open-rate channels available. Our platform handles bulk volume with the delivery performance and compliance features your campaigns demand.

  • High-volume throughput for time-critical campaigns
  • Sender ID management (branded, numeric, shared)
  • Opt-out handling and compliance support
  • Delivery analytics per campaign
Campaign Performance (Sample)
Delivered97.2%
Open Rate91%
Click-through23%
Figures are indicative. Results vary by destination and campaign type.
Integration

Connect your way.

We support the integration methods your platform already uses. No forced migrations, no proprietary lock-in.

REST API
Simple HTTP integration with full API documentation
SMPP
Industry-standard protocol for high-throughput messaging
Webhooks
Real-time delivery receipts pushed to your endpoint
SDK Libraries
Client libraries for Python, Node.js, PHP & Java

Network Infrastructure

Carrier-grade infrastructure,
zero compromise.

Our network is engineered from the ground up for wholesale traffic — redundant at every layer, monitored around the clock, and protected against fraud before it reaches your bill.

Fully Redundant Architecture
No single points of failure. Routes, signalling, and media servers are duplicated across independent paths.
24/7 Network Operations Centre
Live monitoring of all traffic flows. ASR, ACD, and quality metrics watched continuously — issues acted on before you notice them.
Built-in Fraud Protection
IRSF, wangiri, and CLI spoofing detection at the routing layer. Your traffic and revenue are protected from the moment it enters our network.
Direct Global Interconnects
Peering agreements with regional and national carriers across every major world market. Fewer hops, better quality, faster resolution.

Need coverage for a specific destination?

Send us the destination list and we'll provide a route availability and quality assessment within 24 hours.

Request Coverage Check
Partners & Interconnect

Built on Real
Carrier Relationships.

Our network quality starts with who we connect to. We maintain direct interconnects with regional and global carriers — not just aggregator chains.

Partnership Model

Who we work with.

📡

Carriers & Operators

Direct interconnect with national operators and regional carriers for high-quality voice and SMS routes.

  • Direct SS7 & SIP peering
  • Bilateral and unilateral agreements
  • Volume-based commercial terms
🏢

Wholesale Resellers

Partner with us to resell our voice and messaging capacity under your own brand. White-label pricing available.

  • Competitive wholesale rates
  • Flexible margin structures
  • Technical and commercial support
🔗

Technology Partners

Integrate our connectivity layer into your CPaaS, UCaaS, or messaging platform via API or SMPP.

  • API-first integration
  • Dedicated technical onboarding
  • SLA-backed connectivity

Become a Partner

Why partner with
Velocitel Global?

Competitive Pricing

Volume-based rates with room for margin at every level. We structure deals to work for your business model, not just ours.

Dedicated Partner Support

A named account manager, direct escalation paths, and technical support that's actually responsive.

Quality Reporting

Full access to QoS data for your traffic. ASR, ACD, NER — broken down by destination and time period.

Fast Onboarding

Commercial and technical setup completed quickly. We don't let process slow down what should be a straightforward connection.

Interested in partnering?

Tell us about your network and traffic requirements. We'll put together a partnership structure that makes sense for both sides.
